_comment: OpenClaw Memory OS personal taxonomy — PUBLIC PLACEHOLDER TEMPLATE.
This file ships with the public repo so fork operators understand the
shape. It MUST NOT contain real brand names, store fronts, account
handles, or any other operator-specific data.
To use it: copy this file to ../personal_taxonomy.json (the real
config path), edit the placeholder entries (brand_a / brand_b /
brand_c) to your real values, and the loader at
openclaw_memory_os/personal_taxonomy.py will pick it up at runtime.
Override the location by setting the MEMORY_OS_TAXONOMY_PATH env
var to the absolute path of your personal copy. The base path
config/personal_taxonomy.json is gitignored so the real taxonomy
Keys are tier / topic names. Any leading-underscore key (such as
this _comment) is metadata and is ignored by the loader. Values may
be either a list of strings or a list of {"keyword": "..."} dicts.
